column9: Column Header: TRL, Unit / Format: —, Allowed Values: 1–9, Description: Technology Readiness Level on the standard 1–9 scale. For non-mature technologies, TRL values progress across tech_year., Note: See Nomenclature 4.2

column3: Column Header: Technology Maturity, Unit / Format: —, Allowed Values: Prototype, Emerging, Mature, Description: Aggregated maturity classification derived from TRL. Updated per tech_year., Note: See Nomenclature 4.2

Column Header: Technical Efficiency, Unit / Format: [0–1], Allowed Values: 0 < η ≤ 1, Description: Overall energy conversion efficiency: main output energy / main input energy., Note: Based on kWh (electricity, heat) or LHV (chemical fuels)

Column Header: Theoretical Efficiency, Unit / Format: [0–1], Allowed Values: 0 < η ≤ 1, Description: "Ratio of the main outputs energy content (LHV) to the main inputs energy content (LHV) at theoretical maximum.", Note: May be blank if not applicable
Column Header: Operating Temperature, Unit / Format: [°C], Allowed Values: —, Description: Characteristic operating temperature of the core process., Note: Relevant for thermal integration
Column Header: Economic Lifetime, Unit / Format: [years], Allowed Values: > 0, Description: Expected operational lifetime, Note: nan
Column Header: CAPEX One-Time, Unit / Format: [Currency], Allowed Values: ≥ 0, Description: Fixed one-time capital expenditure independent of installed capacity., Note: Per-project lump sum
Column Header: OPEX One-Time, Unit / Format: [Currency], Allowed Values: ≥ 0, Description: Fixed one-time operational expenditure independent of capacity., Note: nan
Column Header: OPEX as % of CAPEX, Unit / Format: [%], Allowed Values: 0–100, Description: Fixed annual operational expenditure expressed as a percentage of total CAPEX., Note: nan

Column Header: OPEX per Capacity (kW), Unit / Format: [Currency / kW / yr], Allowed Values: ≥ 0, Description: Fixed annual operational expenditure per unit of installed capacity, excluding fuel costs., Note: nan

Column Header: OPEX per Energy, Unit / Format: [Currency / kWh] or [Currency / kg], Allowed Values: ≥ 0, Description: Variable operational expenditure per unit of energy or mass output, excluding fuel costs., Note: nan
Column Header: Minimum Installation Size, Unit / Format: [kW] or [kg/h], Allowed Values: ≥ 0, Description: Smallest assumed unit capacity for the technology., Note: 0 if no minimum constraint
Column Header: Uncertainty Rating, Unit / Format: —, Allowed Values: See Nomenclature, Description: Qualitative uncertainty rating for the techno-economic parameters., Note: nan

Column Header: TRL, Unit / Format: —, Allowed Values: 1–9, Description: Technology Readiness Level on the standard 1–9 scale. For non-mature technologies, TRL values progress across tech_year., Note: See Nomenclature 4.2
